name: Slab
description: Slab — Team knowledge base with a clean editor, nested topics, and integrations with Slack and GitHub.

seo.title: Slab — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Slab: Slab — Team knowledge base with a clean editor, nested topics, and integrations with Slack and GitHub.

when_to_use: Team knowledge base connected to Slack and GitHub threads
Engineering runbook wiki with clean search and nested topics
Onboarding docs hub for new team members with structured topics
Product team documentation synced with Slack for discoverability
Internal Q&A knowledge base with permission-controlled access

pros: Clean editor and nested topic structure
Fair pricing for small and midsize teams
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Notion or Confluence
Limited databases or lightweight app features
review.verdict: A focused, polished team wiki for teams that want less Notion sprawl and more structure.
review.best_for: Engineering teams wanting a clean, structured knowledge base integrated with Slack and GitHub.
review.not_for: Teams needing Notion-style databases or Confluences enterprise depth.
